name: Morphous Mountain Goat
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system derived from alpine mountain goat fur, black horns, granite cliff structure, and sure-footed climbing patterns: quiet white surfaces, horn-black hierarchy, granite borders, ice-blue focus, and lichen-sage support states.
typography: Steady grotesk UI for English with firm numeric rhythm; Noto Sans JP or system sans guidance for Japanese labels, generous line-height, and clear kana-kanji contrast.
layout: Stable 8px grids, stepped cliff-ledge grouping, compact controls, granite striation dividers, firm 8px radii, and restrained shadows that keep dashboards easy to scan.
